content.full_text:
March 5, 1979

Ms. Ree Burnap, Treasurer
Santa Cruz County Democratic
Womans Club
105 Paseo Farallon
Aptos, California 95003

Dear Ms. Burnap:

This letter will confirm the advice I provided you by
telephone on March 5, 1979. This advice was based on the facts
contained in your letter to the Commission dated February 20,
1979.

I advised you that the Santa Cruz County Democratic Womans
Club is a "Recipient Committee" because it has received and made
campaign contributions of $500 or more in a calendar year.
Further, I advised you that a Statement of Organization (Form
460) must be filed with the Secretary of State and a Recipient
Committee Campaign Statement-Short Form (Form 450) must be
filed with all appropriate filing officers.

If you have additional questions or if I can be of further
assistance, please contact me.

Sincerely,


John C. Greenwood
Program Coordinator

JCG:bw

FEB 20 12 37 IH 19

SANTA CRUZ COUNTY DEMOCRATIC WOMANS CLUB


105 Paseo Parallon
Aptos, Ca 95003
February 20, 1979

Fair Political Practices Commission
1100 K Street
Sacramento, Ca 95814

To Whom It May Concern:

We need your assistance in tellin us which form our organization
need to file for compliance with the Political Reform
Act.

Our president Olivia Meredith received a copy of the
1979 Information Manual in response to a long distance
telephone call to your office. However it is still
unclear to us which category we fall in, if any.

You will find enclosed a copy of our 1978 treasury
report, which includes our political contributions;
this may be of use to you in answering our query.
As you will note, we collect monies through our
$5.00 per member dues and occasional fund raisers.

Thank you for your assistance in this matter.

Sincerely yours,

Ree Burnap, Treasurer

408 688-3892


Enc.

SANTA CRUZ COUNTY DEMOCRATIC WOMANS CLUB

1978 Treasury Report

1977 Balance forward (forced)                    $ 1127.98

INCOME
Dues - 78 @ $5.00                    $ 390.00
Donation                                    5.00
May 8 lunch                                13.00
July 4 Booth                               60.46
November 2 Tea                             17.50
December Cookies/Cake sale                 29.00
_________
                                    $514.96    $ 1642.94

EXPENDITURES
Stamps (9rolls)                    $ 121.00
Club Newsletter                          52.75
Labels                                    2.70
Catering, Music, etc.                    170.41
Political Donations*                    1123.50
Flowers, Gifts (2)                       22.75
July 4 booth rental                      25.00
Projector rental                          5.00
                                    $1523.25

         December 31, 1978 Balance forward $ 119.69

*Political Donations:

     Mar 30  Ed Borovatz, County Supervisor anti-recall  $ 25.00
             Phil Baldwin,           "                    25.00
     May 18  Local Candidate Forum (1/3 expense)         23.58
     Sep 11  County Democratic Headquarters operation    150.00
     Oct 30  Leon Panetta, 16 CD Committee              250.00
             Yvonne Burke, Atty Genrl   "                250.00
             Henry Mello, 28 AD         "                200.00
             Chief Justice Bird         "                150.00
             Governor Brown             "                 50.00
                                                       __________
                                                       $1123.58
